footer.tagline: Your trusted ride to the waves. Private transfers from SAL Airport to El Salvador's best surf spots.
footer.location: Puerto de La Libertad, El Salvador
footer.copyright: © {year} La Libertad Shuttle. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Your Trusted Ride
hero.subtitle: Private or shared transfers from the airport to El Salvador's best surf spots. SUV or Pickup, surfboards always welcome, fixed price.

services.title: What do you need?
services.subtitle: Two services designed for international travelers and surfers.
services.shuttleDesc: Direct transfer from SAL International Airport to your destination in La Libertad. Private (whole vehicle) or shared (per person). No waiting, no stress, surfboards welcome.
services.toursDesc: Explore Punta Roca, El Sunzal, El Zonte and more spots with a local guide. Perfect for surfers of all levels who want to make the most of every day.

destinations.title: Where are you going?
destinations.subtitle: Fixed and transparent prices. No negotiation, no surprises.
destinations.note: One-way prices. Private SUV: round trip +$30 · Pickup: round trip +$35 · Shared: +$10/person. Surfboard included in all vehicles.
destinations.d1Desc: The heart of the coast. Seafood market, boardwalk and the famous fishermen's pier.
destinations.d2Desc: The surfers' hub. Relaxed vibes, hostels, bars and consistent waves for all levels.
destinations.d3Desc: World-class point break, perfect for longboard and intermediate-advanced surfers.
destinations.d4Desc: Bitcoin Beach. Bohemian vibe, hollow wave and international community of surfers and nomads.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: 4 simple steps for your transfer.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Choose date, arrival time, destination, number of passengers and vehicle type.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Secure payment via PayPal. 50% deposit to confirm.
howItWorks.s3Title: We'll be waiting at the airport
howItWorks.s3Desc: Your driver will arrive with a sign and help with luggage.
howItWorks.s4Desc: Direct and comfortable ride to your destination. No unscheduled stops.

testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.t1Text: Perfect service. Driver was waiting right at the exit with a sign. Got to El Tunco in under an hour, no stress. Will book again next trip.
testimonials.t2Text: Super friendly and punctual. The driver gave us tips on the best spots based on the tide that day. Incredible service!
testimonials.t3Text: Traveled with 2 surfboards and 4 bags, no problem at all with the SUV. Best way to start a surf trip in El Salvador.

whatsapp.title: Have questions?
whatsapp.subtitle: Message us on WhatsApp. We respond in less than 1 hour.

shuttle.title: Book your shuttle
shuttle.subtitle: SAL Airport → La Libertad & Beaches · Fixed price, no surprises.

form.pickupSub: Up to 4 passengers · Open bed for gear
form.roundTripNote: +${amount} USD for the return trip to the airport.
form.roundTripNoteShared: +$10 USD per person for the return trip.
form.name: Full name *
form.notesPlaceholder: Any special requests, baby seat, extra luggage…
form.errorApi: An error occurred while processing your booking. Please try again.
form.availabilityEmpty: No times are available for this date.

summary.completeFields: Complete all required fields to continue.
summary.securePayment: Secure payment via PayPal · SSL encrypted

packages.title: More adventures await
packages.subtitle: We're building curated packages for your El Salvador experience.
packages.p1Desc: Full-day guided visits to Punta Roca, El Sunzal, El Zonte and hidden gems.
packages.p2Desc: ISA World Surfing Games & local competition logistics, sorted.
packages.p3Desc: Explore Chorros de la Calera and the lush jungles of La Libertad.
packages.p4Desc: Pupusas, ceviche and mariscos — a local foodie tour of the coast.

success.title: Booking confirmed!
success.subtitle: You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
success.description: Your driver will be waiting with a sign. Enjoy El Salvador!

cancelled.title: Payment cancelled
cancelled.subtitle: No charges were made.
cancelled.description: You can go back to the form and try again whenever you're ready.

meta.homeTitle: La Libertad Shuttle | Airport Transfers & Surf Tours in El Salvador
meta.homeDesc: Private transfers from SAL International Airport to La Libertad, El Tunco, El Sunzal and El Zonte. Guided surf tours to El Salvador's best surf spots.
meta.homeOgTitle: La Libertad Shuttle | Airport Transfers & Surf Tours
meta.homeOgDesc: Your trusted ride to the waves. Private transfers from SAL to La Libertad.
meta.shuttleDesc: Private or shared transfer from SAL International Airport to La Libertad, El Tunco, El Sunzal or El Zonte. Fixed price, surfboards welcome.
